evidence.description: All 8 previous findings (FIND-SPEC-001 through FIND-SPEC-008) verified as resolved: pipeline input includes currentNote, same-note is pre-pipeline guard, SaveError mapping defined, PROP-EPNS-004 required, NoteFileSaved field sourcing specified, IdleState same-note clarified, PROP-EPNS-019 added, classifyCurrentSession signature updated.
EditingState (lines 24-32) and EditPastNoteStartInput (behavioral-spec lines 32-36) both lack previousFrontmatter, creating a data-flow gap for the BlurSave port.

PROP-EPNS-001 through PROP-EPNS-005 required obligations verified as correctly stated. PROP-EPNS-019 added for same-note Clock proof. Coverage matrix covers all 12 requirements. PROP-EPNS-013 Clock call count description is incorrect for the empty path due to upstream spec contradiction in REQ-EPNS-012.
